---
title: "Canadian Metaresearch Data Challenge"
---

This is the submission for the [Canadian Metaresearch Data Challenge](https://carn-recar.ca/2nd-canadian-open-science-conference-call-for-proposal-canadian-metaresearch-data-challenge/), part of the 2nd Canadian Open Science Conference (University of Ottawa, October 27–29, 2026). The call asks for a methodology to construct an open, reproducible, and inclusive dataset capturing the Canadian metaresearch landscape. Selected teams receive up to CAD $4,000 to implement the proposed methodology and present findings at the conference.

The **[proposal](proposal.qmd)** builds a directory of Canadian metaresearch initiatives, the people who drive them, and the works that result. It draws on funding records and OpenAlex, constructed in two phases: identifying and collecting information about each initiative, then analyzing the resulting materials to characterize each initiative's methods and disciplinary orientation.

The **[data sources, model, and pipeline](pipeline.qmd)** page expands on the two sources, the two-phase construction process, and the resulting data model summarized in the proposal.

Submitted: **July 15, 2026**. Notification: **August 1, 2026**.
